decoder.name: huawei-usg-custom
decoder.regex: protocol=([^,]+), source-ip=([^,]+), source-port=([0-9]+), destination-ip=([^,]+), destination-port=([0-9]+), time=[A-Za-z]+ [0-9]+ [0-9]+ [0-9:]+, source-zone=([^,]+), destination-zone=([^,]+), application-name=([^,]*), rule-name=(.+?)\.?$
decoder.order: protocol, srcip, srcport, dstip, dstport, src_zone, dst_zone, application, rule_name
